productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Red  T-Shirt
description: Composition Red Official Merchandise manchester united polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has slim, narrow polo collar with double top stitching and three button placket, back neck inner seam binding and printed labelling for irritation free comfort, short sleeves with contrast cuffs, Manchester United Club badge appliqued on chest and branding printed on back, white inserts at shoulder and hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with this Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club polo t-shirt. This short sleeved top pays homage to the incredibly successful team with Club badge on the front and bold text across the back. Team this with jeans and a tee for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man U article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
